Space Exploration: Why don't aliens use the internet? They prefer space-book!
What do astronauts use to keep their pants up? Asteroid belts!
How do astronauts organize a party? They planet!
What kind of music do planets listen to? Nep-tunes!
Why did the sun go to school? To get a little brighter!
What's an astronaut's favorite key on the keyboard? The space bar!
Why did the moon break up with the sun? Because it needed some space!
How does a spaceship say sorry? It Apollo-gizes!
Why couldn't the astronaut book a hotel room? The moon was full!
What do you call a telescope that sings? A star-performer!
Why did the rocket scientist quit? He comet too far!
What's a spaceman's favorite chocolate? A Mars bar!
How do stars stay cool? They have lots of fans!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed some space!
What did the alien say to the garden? Take me to your weeder!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything, even in space!
What's a satellite's favorite movie? The Right Stuff!
How do you throw a space party? You planet!
What did Earth say to the other planets? You guys have no life!
Why couldn't the astronaut focus on his work? He kept spacing out!
Sporting Achievements: Why did the basketball join the band? It wanted to learn how to dribble to the beat!
What's a soccer ball's favorite candy? A GOALactic bar!
Why was the baseball player a great detective? He could catch anything, even the most fly cases!
How do runners stay cool? They're always fans of the wind sprint!
Why was the football sad? It was feeling a bit deflated after being kicked around all day!
What do you call a dinosaur that scores a touchdown? A dino-score!
Why don't scientists trust atoms in sports? Because they make up everything, even the trophy!
How do swimmers always stay positive? They refuse to let anything dampen their spirits!
What's a tennis player's favorite fruit? Serve-berries!
Why was the gymnast great at math? She knew all about the perfect 10!
What's a golf ball's favorite insect? A tee-rantuala!
How do you make a tissue dance in the sports arena? Put a little boogie in it!
Why did the bicycle fall over after winning? It was two-tired from the race!
What's a hockey player's favorite drink? Penal-tea!
Why was the stadium so cold? Because there were too many fans!
What's a referee's favorite dessert? Flags and cream!
How do surfers say hello? They wave!
Why don't skeletons play sports? They don't have the guts, and their hearts aren't in it!
What runs but never gets anywhere? The scoreboard!
Why was the math book sad at the sports game? It had too many problems to solve!
Scientific Discoveries: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What did the proton say to the electron? 'I'm positive we're going to have a great attraction!'
What do you call a dinosaur with an extensive vocabulary? A thesaurus!
Why was the math book sad? It had too many problems!
How do you organize a space party? You planet!
What did one tectonic plate say when it bumped into another? 'Sorry, my fault!'
Why can't you trust a molecule? They make up everything, even atoms!
What's a astronaut's favorite key on the keyboard? The space bar!
I was going to tell a chemistry joke, but all the good ones argon!
Why did the biology student break up with the physics student? There was no chemistry!
What do you call a fish made of two sodium atoms? 2Na (tuna)!
Why did the scientist put a knocker on his door? He wanted to win the No-bell prize!
What's a tornado's favorite game? Twister!
Why don't geologists get stressed? They take everything for granite!
What happened to the plant in math class? It grew square roots!
What do you call a snake that's exactly 3.14 feet long? A pi-thon!
Why couldn't the geologist concentrate? He had too many things on his mind!
What's a physicist's favorite kind of dog? A lab!
What did Earth say to the other planets? 'You guys have no life!'
Why did the scarecrow win the Nobel Prize? He was outstanding in his field!
Famous Portraits: Why was the Mona Lisa so good at hide and seek? Because no one could figure out where her eyebrows went!
What did Van Gogh say to his self-portrait? 'I've got my eye on you!'
How does the Mona Lisa take a selfie? She just smiles... eventually.
What's a painting's favorite type of music? Portrait rock!
Why was the portrait always calm during emergencies? It was trained to keep a straight face!
What do you call a painting that tells jokes? A portrait of comedy!
Why couldn't the famous portrait go to the party? It was framed for something it didn't do!
How do portraits communicate? They FaceTime each other!
What did one portrait say to the other at the museum? 'I feel like everyone's watching us!'
Why don't portraits ever get lost? They always know how to draw a map!
What's a portrait's favorite day of the week? Face-day!
How do you make a portrait laugh? Canvas tickle it!
Why did the self-portrait win the art contest? It really knew the subject well!
What do you call a portrait that can sing? A masterpiece of music!
Why was the portrait feeling blue? Someone said it wasn't drawn very well!
What's a painting's favorite breakfast? Brush strokes with a side of canvas cakes!
Why did the portrait go to school? To get a little more framed-ucation!
How do portraits travel? They get framed and shipped first class!
What did the portrait say when complimented? 'Thanks, I've been working on my image!'
Why don't portraits ever tell secrets? Because they know they're always being watched!
Political History: Why did Thomas Jefferson always win at hide and seek? Because he was good at drafting the Declaration of In-DEPENDS-ence!
What's Abraham Lincoln's favorite dessert? Log cabin syrup on his pan-CAKE-ipation Proclamation!
How do you make George Washington laugh? Valley Forge tickles!
Why was the Constitution so popular at school? It had all the right amendments!
What did one flag say to the other? Nothing, it just waved!
Why don't they play poker in the jungle? Too many Cheetahs! Just like in some elections!
Why was the politician always cold? He kept getting the cold shoulder from voters!
What's a politician's favorite place to nap? The Supreme Court!
How is history class like a remote control? They both let you fast-forward through the boring parts!
What do you call it when one president tells another a joke? Executive humor!
Why did the politician cross the road? To get to the other side of the aisle!
What's a president's favorite game? Veto-tag!
Why was the history book sad? It had too many dates, but no one to go out with!
What do you call a dinosaur that wins an election? The DINO-crat!
How do presidents stay cool? They have constitutional fans!
Why was the White House cafeteria so popular? It served Commander-in-Cheese sandwiches!
What's a politician's favorite musical instrument? The tax trumpet!
Why couldn't the Declaration of Independence go out to play? It was grounded for too many run-on sentences!
How do you organize a space party for politicians? You planet!
What do you call a president's autobiography? An oval office supply!
Global Conflicts: Why don't countries play hide and seek? Because good luck hiding Greece!
What do you call it when countries argue over dessert? A pie-litical conflict!
How do nations apologize? They wave the white flag and say 'My bad-minton!'
Why was the map stressed out? Too many border disputes!
What's a conflict resolution specialist's favorite dessert? Peace cake!
Why did the soldier bring a ladder to the peace talks? He heard the negotiations were on another level!
How do countries share the ocean? They draw water borders—but the fish never respect them!
What's a diplomat's favorite game? Trouble—but they call it 'International Relations'!
Why couldn't the two countries share the mountain? They both wanted to be on top!
How do nations solve basketball disputes? United Nations peacekeeping referees!
What do you call a country that loves making jokes? A comic relief nation!
Why did the country bring a dictionary to the peace talks? To make sure everyone was on the same page!
What's a country's favorite dance? The diplomacy shuffle—two steps forward, one step back!
How do arguing countries make up? They send each other friend-chip cookies!
Why did the United Nations start a band? They wanted to create world harmony!
What's a conflicted country's favorite breakfast? Peace of toast!
How do warring nations decide who gets the river? They go with the flow!
Why did the diplomat bring a spoon to the negotiation? Someone said there might be a ceasefire!
What did one flag say to the other? 'Stop waving at me, I'm trying to have a serious conversation!'
How do countries end food fights? With a pizza treaty!
Artistic Movements: Why was the Renaissance painting always invited to parties? Because it was a masterpiece of social skills!
What did the Cubist say to the confused art student? 'Don't worry, I'm just looking at things from different angles!'
How do Impressionist painters stay cool? They use brush strokes of genius!
Why did the Surrealist's clock always melt? It was having a Salvador Dalí of a time keeping up!
What's a Pop Artist's favorite snack? Andy War-hols!
Why couldn't the Abstract artist finish the painting? They couldn't connect the dots!
How does a Baroque painter answer the phone? 'Yellow? It's gold actually!'
What do you call a Pointillist who can't make up their mind? Dot-to-dot indecisive!
Why was the Dadaist artwork confused? It didn't make sense of itself either!
What's a Minimalist's favorite math problem? Reducing fractions!
How do Futurists travel? They zoom ahead of their time!
Why did the Rococo painting get in trouble? Too many frilly details for one canvas!
What's a Modernist's favorite day? New Year's Day - out with the old, in with the new!
Why are Expressionist paintings so emotional? They really put their heart on the canvas!
How does a Realist artist order pizza? 'I want it exactly as it appears in the menu photo!'
What did the Art Nouveau painting say to the building? 'We've got some great curves in common!'
Why was the Post-Impressionist painting pixelated? It was just trying to make a point!
How do Constructivist artists build sandcastles? With geometric precision and revolutionary purpose!
What's a Romanticist painter's favorite weather? Dramatic storms with emotional lighting!
Why did the Neoclassical statue join the debate team? It had strong classical arguments!
Technological Advances: Why don't smartphones ever get lost? They can always find themselves on the map!
What do computers eat for lunch? Microchips with byte-sized sandwiches!
How does a robot dog scratch its fleas? With its mouse pad!
Why was the computer cold? It left its Windows open!
What's a robot's favorite type of music? Heavy metal!
Why did the smartphone go to therapy? It had too many app-xiety issues!
How do astronauts organize a party? They planet!
What do you call a dinosaur with Wi-Fi? A Stega-surf-us!
Why can't you trust atoms? They make up everything, even your new tablet!
What did the calculator say to the student? You can count on me!
How does a computer stay cool? It uses its fan club!
Why did the website go to the doctor? It had a virus!
What did one drone say to the other? I'm really feeling fly today!
Why was the robot so good at basketball? It always shoots with perfect algorithms!
What's a computer's favorite snack? Cookies... but it prefers ones without tracking chips!
How do tech-savvy birds communicate? They use tweet messages!
Why did the selfie go to jail? It was framed!
What do you call a virtual assistant that sings? Artificial Harmonies!
Why did the video game character cross the road? To get to the next level!
How does a smart doorbell stay in shape? It does ring exercises!
Cultural Celebrations: Why don't scientists trust atoms on New Year's Eve? Because they make up everything, even their resolutions!
What did the Christmas tree say to the ornament? 'You light up my life, but you're hanging around too much!'
How does a snowman celebrate Hanukkah? With a snow menorah and eight nights of cold jokes!
What do you call a Diwali celebration in the ocean? A festival of lights... and fish!
Why was the Thanksgiving turkey afraid? It saw the family gathering and knew the stakes were high!
How do astronauts celebrate Cinco de Mayo? They planet with space-ial tacos!
What's a ghost's favorite holiday? BOO-ddhist New Year, of course!
Why did the Easter egg hide? It was a little chicken about the celebration!
What kind of music do mummies listen to during Ramadan? Wrap music!
How do you organize a space party for Lunar New Year? You planet!
Why don't eggs tell jokes on April Fool's Day? They'd crack each other up!
What do clouds wear to St. Patrick's Day parties? Their rain-bows!
How does the ocean say Happy Kwanzaa? It waves!
What did one flag say to the other on Independence Day? 'Nothing, it just waved!'
Why did the scarecrow win an award at the harvest festival? Because he was outstanding in his field!
What do you call a Valentine's Day card from a cow? Moo-sic to my ears!
How do pumpkins talk on Halloween? They use their vine of communication!
What's Cupid's favorite music on Chinese New Year? Any song with a great arrow-dynamic beat!
Why was the math book sad at the Carnival celebration? It had too many problems!
What did the dreidel say after spinning all night? 'I'm getting dizzy with excitement!'
Environmental Moments: Why did the sun go to school? It wanted to get a little brighter and power up its solar education!
What do trees wear to pool parties? Swimming trunks!
How does the ocean say hello? It waves!
Why don't mountains ever get cold? They wear snow caps!
What did one raindrop say to another during a drought? 'We've got to stick together!'
What's a tornado's favorite game? Twister!
Why did the recycling bin go to therapy? It had too many issues to sort through!
How do trees access the internet? They log in!
What kind of shorts do clouds wear? Thunderwear!
Why was the wind arrested? It was breaking too many branches!
What did the flower say to the bee? 'Hey bud, thanks for always stopping by!'
Why did the gardener plant a light bulb? They wanted to grow a bright idea!
What's a river's favorite type of music? Something that goes with the flow!
Why couldn't the bicycle stand up by itself? It was two-tired from reducing carbon emissions!
How do you organize an Earth Day party? You planet!
What do you call a snowman in summer? A puddle!
Why are forests so snooty? They're full of stuck-up trees!
What happens when it rains cats and dogs? You have to be careful not to step in a poodle!
